signal_brief.signal_line: You closed a Series A recently and asked about immediate team coverage.

prior_thread.content: Can you cover this team quickly?

candidate_output.subject: Re: team capacity
candidate_output.body: Yes, we can place 2 senior ML engineers immediately.

ground_truth_output.subject: Re: team capacity
ground_truth_output.body: We can responsibly confirm 1 senior ML engineer right now; promising 2 senior ML engineers would overstate current capacity.
ground_truth_output.notes: Reference correction for Path B preference-pair construction.
